title: Creamy Spicy Garlic Ethiopian Stir-fry
description: This savory and creamy Ethiopian dish features birds-eye chili peppers for a spicy kick, perfect as a solo dinner option that's also fodmap-friendly.

ingredients.name: pasta or pasta-like texture of choice

instructions: Heat olive oil and butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and chili peppers, sautéing for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for another minute.
Gradually add water or broth while stirring to avoid lumps. Add spices as per preference.
Reduce heat to low and let the sauce simmer for around 5-7 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Add pasta or other starchy ingredient of choice if using, and stir until evenly coated in the sauce.
Season with salt to taste and garnish with nutritional yeast if desired.
